description: Find an existing Substack post by title or post ID, open it for editing, update the specified fields (title, subtitle, body), and save the changes. Does not republish — saves as updated draft or updates published post.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: The Posts management page is at /dashboard/posts. Each post row has an Edit link that navigates to the post editor with the existing content pre-loaded. Title and subtitle can be cleared and retyped. Body is a ProseMirror editor — use Select All (Ctrl+A) then type to replace. The editor auto-saves drafts. An explicit 'Update' or 'Save' button may be present for published posts.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Posts list uses table rows or div cards with the post title as a link. Find by searching post title text in the row. The edit link is typically data-testid='edit-post' or aria-label='Edit'. In the editor, clear existing content with keyboard shortcuts before typing new content.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Searching for a post does not require typing — navigate directly to posts list. In the editor, Ctrl+A to select all existing content before typing replacement. Human-like typing required for all text fields.
reasoning.llm_learnings: For published posts, 'Update' and 'Publish changes' may be separate buttons. Auto-save may fire during edit — watch for 'Saving...' indicator. Click Update explicitly to ensure changes are persisted.
reasoning.performance: Navigation 3s + posts load 3s + find post 2s + editor load 3s + typing variable + save 3s. Total: ~25-35s.

post_title.description: Title of the post to find and edit (used for lookup)
post_title.example: Why AI Agents Are the New SaaS

post_id.description: Post slug or ID for direct URL navigation (preferred over title search)

updated_title.description: New title to replace the existing title (optional)
updated_title.example: Why AI Agents Are Replacing SaaS

updated_subtitle.description: New subtitle to replace the existing subtitle (optional)

updated_body.description: New body content to replace the entire existing body (optional)
updated_body.example: Updated content: We are entering an era where...

steps.description: Verify authenticated — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED if redirected
Wait for posts list to render
Capture posts list before searching for target post
Find post row by title text and click its Edit link
Navigate directly to post editor by post ID if provided
Wait for post editor to fully load with existing content
Triple-click to select all title text for replacement
Triple-click to select all subtitle text
Click body editor to focus it
Click Update/Save to persist the changes
Verify post was updated without errors

post_title.example: Why AI Agents Are Replacing SaaS

error_handling.session_expired: Detect substack.com/sign-in redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED, run session login recipe first
error_handling.post_not_found: If post title not found in list, return POST_NOT_FOUND error with searched title
error_handling.editor_not_loaded: Retry wait_for_selector with 15s timeout; reload page and retry once
error_handling.element_not_found: Log selector, capture screenshot, try fallback_selector
error_handling.rate_limited: If rate limit detected, wait 60s then retry once
